description_long: This is a rectangular decorative pillow featuring a vibrant, multicolored abstract pattern reminiscent of modern art, with swirling lines, checkerboard motifs, and organic shapes in hues of red, blue, black, white, and beige. Each of the four corners is adorned with a bright red tassel, adding a playful and textured accent to the design. The pillow's surface appears to be made of a soft fabric, likely cotton or a cotton blend, with a smooth, matte finish. The stuffing inside gives it a plush, slightly rounded form, suggesting comfort and support. The overall look is artistic and eye-catching, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban settings such as benches, patios, or public seating areas. No visible brand logos or tags are present, and the pillow appears clean and well-maintained.
description: A rectangular pillow with a colorful abstract pattern and red tassels on each corner, made of soft fabric and plush filling. The design is vibrant and artistic, with a clean and well-kept appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full abstract pattern and all four red tassels clearly.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the pillow's narrow edge and the alignment of the tassels at the top and bottom.
description_view_2: Back view, nearly identical to the front, with the same colorful pattern and visible tassels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the pillow's slim profile and the vertical arrangement of the tassels.
attribute_pattern: abstract geometric and organic pattern with checkerboard and swirling motifs
